content: Update index.css to import Google Fonts (Space Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono)
Create useFileUpload.ts hook with file selection, validation, upload progress, and error handling
Create useColumnMapping.ts hook with mapping state, auto-suggestions, and template management
Build FileUploadZone.tsx component with drag-and-drop, validation, and progress bar
Build UploadProgressTracker.tsx component with stepper UI and status tracking
Build ColumnMappingWizard.tsx component with step-by-step mapping and confidence scores
Build DataPreviewTable.tsx component with pagination, inline editing, and row selection
Build ValidationResultsPanel.tsx component with summary cards, filters, and issue table
Build ImportHistoryList.tsx component with status badges and quick actions
Create UploadPage.tsx page composing upload zone, history, and progress tracker
Create ReviewPage.tsx page composing mapping wizard, preview, and validation results
Add routes to App.js for upload and review pages
Test components with screenshots and verify design compliance
